chunks.text: On Monday afternoon, I was drawing a still life in art class.
On the desk, there were a red apple, a green leaf
With a pencil, I first drew a large circle softly
and slowly changed it into the shape of an apple.
“ When you find a shape, first use pale lines softly.
Later, when you are used to it, use thick lines strongly.
Then, the picture will become alive,” our teacher said kindly.
my sister was drawing a round moon and small stars with straight light.
Her paper was full of a quiet night sky.
Tom drew a more abstract picture by putting many shapes together.
“ Each shape has its own character,” he said with a serious face.
